task_completion.description: Verify the Nx Witness VMS Desktop Client is open and connected to the local server.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Nx Witness VMS Desktop Client application window is visible, showing the main interface or the login screen with credentials being entered.

task_completion.description: Verify the Event Rules configuration dialog is open.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A window or dialog titled 'Event Rules' or similar rule configuration screen is open within the Nx Witness client.

task_completion.description: Verify the event is configured as a Soft Trigger named 'Activate Lockdown' for all users and devices.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Event Rules dialog, the 'Event' type is set to 'Soft Trigger'. The trigger name field contains 'Activate Lockdown'. Settings for users/cameras indicate 'All users' and 'All devices' or 'All cameras'.

task_completion.description: Verify the action is set to 'Show Text Overlay' on all cameras.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Action section of the rule, the action type dropdown is set to 'Show text overlay' and the target cameras are set to 'All' or 'All cameras'.

task_completion.description: Verify the text overlay content is set to 'SECURITY ALERT: LOCKDOWN'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text input field for the overlay action contains exactly 'SECURITY ALERT: LOCKDOWN'.

task_completion.description: Verify the duration of the text overlay is set to at least 5 seconds.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The duration, timer, or 'Show for' setting in the action configuration is set to 5 seconds (or 5000 ms) or greater.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Nx Witness GUI to create the rule rather than making direct API calls.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Nx Witness Desktop Client's graphical interface (Event Rules dialog) rather than a terminal window running curl commands or Python scripts targeting the /rest/v1/eventRules endpoint.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Nx Witness application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Nx Witness VMS Desktop Client interface is clearly visible and being interacted with, not a text editor, notes app, or web search.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not attempt to bypass the client by modifying backend databases directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing SQLite or other database command-line interfaces are used to insert the event rule.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected trigger name is 'Activate Lockdown' (case-insensitive). The expected action text is 'SECURITY ALERT: LOCKDOWN' (case-insensitive). The minimum duration for the overlay must be 5 seconds (5000 ms).
